description_long: This stereo sound system consists of a central unit flanked by two rectangular speakers, all featuring a combination of light gray and wood-textured finishes. The central unit has a digital display at the top, with the JVC logo above it, and a set of round control buttons and a large volume knob below the display. The lower section of the central unit includes a disc tray and additional ports. The speakers have a minimalist design with smooth, wood-textured sides and plain gray fronts. The rear of the central unit shows ventilation grilles and several connection ports, while the speakers' backs are plain wood-textured panels. The overall design is compact and modern, suitable for placement on a shelf or table in an urban environment.
description: A compact stereo sound system with a central control unit and two wood-textured speakers, featuring a digital display, control buttons, and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, JVC logo, control buttons, volume knob, disc tray, and the plain gray fronts of the two speakers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-textured side panels of the speakers and the depth of the central unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ventilation grilles and connection ports on the central unit, with the wood-textured backs of the speakers visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wood-textured side panels of the speakers and the side of the central unit.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'JVC' logo is visible above the display screen on the central unit's front panel.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are plain, flat gray panels with no visible perforation, mesh, or decorative pattern.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front of the central unit, featuring a row of round buttons, a large circular volume knob, and a disc tray below the buttons. The display screen is positioned above the controls.
